summary: This source is a brief biographical blurb accompanying a portrait of Dr. Virginia M.Y. Lee at the Perelman School of Medicine. It highlights her and Dr. John Q. Trojanowski's landmark discoveries regarding misfolded proteins (tau, alpha-synuclein, and TDP-43) in neurodegenerative diseases like Alzheimer's, Parkinson's, and ALS. The text contains no direct quotes, frameworks, or detailed methodologies from Dr. Lee.
